payload.summary: Seeded Cisco foundry-security-spec as the Sentinel security-evaluation capability via OpenSpec (not spec-kit). All ~35 foundry clarification markers were resolved interactively before authoring; the seed vendors an adapted constitution and hardens the spec into WHEN/THEN deltas, deferring role implementation to /plan-roadmap.

decisions.title: Map 8 roles onto existing coordinator
decisions.rationale: Reuse agent-coordinator/worker/validator infra rather than a parallel stack.

decisions.title: Approach A: single cohesive capability
decisions.rationale: Cohesive, reviewable, archivable; bindings in design.md; no MODIFIED deltas in seed.

decisions.title: Accept multi-vendor deviation D-1
decisions.rationale: Reuse repo multi-vendor routing; mitigate with verdict-provenance requirement.

next_steps: After Gate 2 approval: wire constitution reference into openspec/project.md (task 2.1).
Run /plan-roadmap against the seed to decompose role implementation.
